entities.description: The measure of crop yield and efficiency in agricultural production

entities.description: An essential mineral nutrient required for plant growth, often limiting in West African soils

entities.description: Commercially available phosphorus fertilizers that are water-soluble and often expensive

entities.name: PHOSPHATE ROCK
entities.description: Locally available mineral deposits used as an alternative source of phosphorus for soil supply

entities.name: MINERAL PLANT NUTRITION
entities.description: The process of providing essential minerals to plants for healthy growth

entities.name: CHEMICAL AND MINERALOGICAL COMPOSITION
entities.description: The internal makeup of phosphate rocks that determines their effectiveness

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: External factors that influence the effectiveness of phosphate rock application

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: The plants being cultivated for agricultural production

entities.name: MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural techniques and strategies used to manage crops and soil

entities.name: FERTILIZER RECOMMENDATIONS
entities.description: Guidelines for the application of mineral fertilizers to optimize crop growth
